sales.title: Ira & Larry Goldberg Coins & Collectibles - Auction 150, Lot 615 — Germanic Invasions. Ca. Mid-late 5th Century AD. Gold Solidus (4.38g) 20mm. Struck in the name of Theodosius II, uncertain mint.  Cuirassed bust of Theodosius II 3/4 facing to r. Reverse: Constantinop
sales.description: Germanic Invasions. Ca. Mid-late 5th Century AD. Gold Solidus (4.38g) 20mm. Struck in the name of Theodosius II, uncertain mint.  Cuirassed bust of Theodosius II 3/4 facing to r. Reverse: Constantinopolis enthroned l. holding globus crueiger and sceptre, foot on prow shield at side and star in l. field. Similar to S-21140 (DOC 346) but different detailed style. NGC graded Mint State, Strike: 5/5, Surface: 3/5 edge bend Amazing fine detailed style, lustrous. A little jewel!  Estimated Value $1,...
